violations.text: Walk-in cooler was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The floors (especially under retail shelves) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Sausages was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Various perishable juices and protein shakes were observed held at 64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage carts in the back storage room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The floors (especially under retail shelves) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The hand-washing sink in the women's restroom was lacking proper hand-washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Various items were observed held between 51-61 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Freezer retail door gasket was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage carts have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The floors throughout the facility, including the walk-ins, storage room, under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Various dairy products and deli meats was observed held at 47-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

The walk in cooler was not in good repair. The ambient temperatures of the walk in cooler was 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit.PIC provided inspector with work order number. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
The walls in the back storage area is in poor repair (observed a hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

The floors and walls in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
